title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Dunzo International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Dunzo International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Dunzo International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About Dunzo International Enterprises:
Dunzo International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo International Enterprises!
